confession_subject_valid.name: confession_subject_valid
confession_subject_valid.value:
(
        ("curriculum_strand"."subject" = 'RELIGION' AND "curriculum_strand"."confession_context" IN ('EVANGELISCH','KATHOLISCH','KONFESSIONSSENSIBEL_UEBERGREIFEND'))
        OR ("curriculum_strand"."subject" = 'ETHIK' AND "curriculum_strand"."confession_context" IN ('RELIGIONSKUNDLICH','NICHT_ANWENDBAR'))
        OR ("curriculum_strand"."subject" = 'DEUTSCH' AND "curriculum_strand"."confession_context" = 'NICHT_ANWENDBAR')
      )

form_track_only_sek_i.name: form_track_only_sek_i
form_track_only_sek_i.value: ("curriculum_strand"."school_stage" = 'SEK_I') OR ("curriculum_strand"."school_form" IS NULL AND "curriculum_strand"."education_track" IS NULL)

track_requires_form.name: track_requires_form
track_requires_form.value: "curriculum_strand"."education_track" IS NULL OR "curriculum_strand"."school_form" IS NOT NULL

source_confession_subject_valid.name: source_confession_subject_valid
source_confession_subject_valid.value:
(
        "source_ref"."subject_alignment" IS NULL
        OR ("source_ref"."subject_alignment" = 'RELIGION' AND "source_ref"."confession_context" IN ('EVANGELISCH','KATHOLISCH','KONFESSIONSSENSIBEL_UEBERGREIFEND'))
        OR ("source_ref"."subject_alignment" = 'ETHIK' AND "source_ref"."confession_context" IN ('RELIGIONSKUNDLICH','NICHT_ANWENDBAR'))
        OR ("source_ref"."subject_alignment" = 'DEUTSCH' AND "source_ref"."confession_context" = 'NICHT_ANWENDBAR')
      )
